titles.title: KIDS Act
KIDS Act
Kids Internet and Digital Safety Act
AI Warnings And Resources for Education Act
Assessing Safety Tools for Parents and Minors Act
AWARE Act
Kids Internet Safety Partnership Act
Kids Online Safety Act
No Fentanyl on Social Media Act
Promoting a Safe Internet for Minors Act
SAFE BOTs Act
Safe Social Media Act
Safeguarding Adolescents From Exploitative BOTs Act
SCREEN Act
Shielding Children’s Retinas from Egregious Exposure on the Net Act
SPY Kids Act
Stop Profiling Youth and Kids Act
To protect children and teens online, empower parents and strengthen families, and for other purposes.

action.text: Referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce, and in addition to the Committee on the Judiciary, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.

Referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce, and in addition to the Committee on the Judiciary, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.
